# immich_asset (Resource)

Manages an Immich asset. Supports uploading a file or managing metadata of an existing asset.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "immich_asset" "example" {
  id          = "your-asset-uuid"
  is_favorite = true
  is_archived = false
  description = "A beautiful sunset"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the asset.
- `device_asset_id` (String) Unique identifier for the asset on the device. Defaults to the filename.
- `device_id` (String) Unique identifier for the device/client. Defaults to 'terraform'.
- `file_created_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp of when the file was created. Defaults to the current time.
- `file_modified_at` (String) ISO 8601 timestamp of when the file was last modified. Defaults to the current time.
- `filename` (String) Path to the local file to upload. If provided, the asset will be uploaded to Immich.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the asset. If filename is provided, this is computed after upload.
- `is_archived` (Boolean) Whether the asset is archived.
- `is_favorite` (Boolean) Whether the asset is marked as a favorite.
- `latitude` (Number) Latitude of the asset.
- `longitude` (Number) Longitude of the asset.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

### OpenTofu Import Block (Recommended)

```terraform
import {
  to = immich_asset.example
  id = "your-asset-uuid"
}
```

### CLI Import

```terraform
tofu import immich_asset.example your-asset-uuid
```
